title: Tiny Dragon Companion
summary: Palm-sized baby dragon with iridescent scales  -  Ghibli-inspired plush-toy charm.
prompt: An adorable tiny baby dragon perched on a fingertip, palm-of-hand scale. Soft round body, oversized blue eyes, translucent pearl-like scales in mint and lavender, tiny iridescent wings, a curious head-tilt expression. Studio Ghibli inspired illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm cozy lighting, cream background with subtle sparkle effects. Square composition, plush-toy charm.
